name: Timber Wars
short_description: In Timber Wars, protect sacred trees from relentless lumberjacks and machines. Summon and upgrade guardian trees with points earned over time or by defeating enemies. Strategically place and strengthen your guardians to defend the forest for as long as you can in this intense top-down strategy game.
detailed_description:
Timber Wars is an action-packed, top-down strategy game where the fate of sacred forests rests in your hands. The ancient trees are under constant threat from relentless lumberjacks and destructive machines, and it’s up to you to protect them for as long as possible. As the guardian of the forest, summon and command a variety of powerful guardian trees to fend off these invaders and keep the sacred trees safe.

Strategically place your guardian trees and upgrade them using points earned over time or by defeating enemies. Each upgrade strengthens the abilities of your guardian trees, allowing you to withstand increasingly difficult waves of enemies. Use your resources wisely to build a powerful defense and prevent the sacred trees from being destroyed.

Save the sacred trees as long as you can in Timber Wars!
